name: 安装并配置 Qwen Code ACP Agent
description: 安装 Qwen Code（qwen）并写入 QwenPaw 当前 workspace 的 ACP runner 配置，用于 delegate_external_agent 调用。
code:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

RUNNER_NAME="{{runner_name}}"
INSTALL_METHOD="{{install_method}}"
VERSION="{{version}}"
WORKSPACE_DIR="{{workspace_dir}}"
PATCH_CONFIG="{{patch_qwenpaw_config}}"
ENABLE_DELEGATE_TOOL="{{enable_delegate_tool}}"
API_KEY="{{api_key}}"
API_KEY_ENV="{{api_key_env}}"
API_BASE_URL="{{api_base_url}}"
MODEL_ID="{{model_id}}"
TOOL_PARSE_MODE="{{tool_parse_mode}}"
STDIO_LIMIT="{{stdio_buffer_limit_bytes}}"

if ! command -v npm >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "ERROR: npm is required. Install Node.js/npm first." >&2
  exit 1
fi

if [[ "$INSTALL_METHOD" == "global" ]]; then
  SPEC="@qwen-code/qwen-code"
  if [[ -n "$VERSION" && "$VERSION" != "latest" ]]; then
    SPEC="${SPEC}@${VERSION}"
  fi
  echo "Installing Qwen Code globally: $SPEC"
  npm install -g "$SPEC"
  hash -r
  if ! command -v qwen >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "ERROR: qwen command not found after npm install" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
  echo "Qwen Code command is available: $(command -v qwen)"
elif [[ "$INSTALL_METHOD" == "npx" ]]; then
  echo "Verifying npx can run @qwen-code/qwen-code"
  echo "Configured npx command: npx -y @qwen-code/qwen-code -- --acp"
else
  echo "Skipping Qwen Code install because install_method=skip"
  if ! command -v qwen >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "ERROR: qwen command not found. Choose install_method=global/npx or install Qwen Code first." >&2
    exit 1
  fi
  echo "Qwen Code command is available: $(command -v qwen)"
fi

if [[ "$PATCH_CONFIG" != "true" ]]; then
  echo "Skipping QwenPaw agent.json patch because patch_qwenpaw_config=false"
  exit 0
fi

AGENT_JSON="$WORKSPACE_DIR/agent.json"
if [[ ! -f "$AGENT_JSON" ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: agent.json not found: $AGENT_JSON" >&2
  exit 1
fi

BACKUP="$AGENT_JSON.bak.$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)"
cp -a "$AGENT_JSON" "$BACKUP"
echo "Backed up agent config: $BACKUP"

python3 - "$AGENT_JSON" "$RUNNER_NAME" "$INSTALL_METHOD" "$API_KEY" "$API_KEY_ENV" "$API_BASE_URL" "$MODEL_ID" "$TOOL_PARSE_MODE" "$STDIO_LIMIT" "$ENABLE_DELEGATE_TOOL" <<'PY'
import json
import os
import sys
from pathlib import Path

agent_json = Path(sys.argv[1])
runner_name = sys.argv[2]
install_method = sys.argv[3]
api_key = sys.argv[4]
api_key_env = sys.argv[5]
api_base_url = sys.argv[6]
model_id = sys.argv[7]
tool_parse_mode = sys.argv[8]
stdio_limit = sys.argv[9]
enable_delegate_tool = sys.argv[10]

if install_method == "npx":
    command = "npx"
    args = ["-y", "@qwen-code/qwen-code", "--", "--acp"]
else:
    command = "qwen"
    args = ["--acp"]

env = {}
if api_base_url:
    env["OPENAI_BASE_URL"] = api_base_url

runner_cfg = {
    "enabled": True,
    "command": command,
    "args": args,
    "env": env,
    "trusted": True,
    "tool_parse_mode": tool_parse_mode,
    "stdio_buffer_limit_bytes": int(stdio_limit),
}

data = json.loads(agent_json.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

# Configure ACP runner
data.setdefault("acp", {}).setdefault("agents", {})[runner_name] = runner_cfg

# Make delegate_external_agent available if requested
if enable_delegate_tool == "true":
    data.setdefault("tools", {}).setdefault("agent", {}).setdefault("delegate_external_agent", {})
    data["tools"]["agent"]["delegate_external_agent"].update({
        "name": "delegate_external_agent",
        "enabled": True,
        "description": "Delegate work to an external ACP agent runner",
        "display_to_user": True,
        "async_execution": False,
        "icon": "📡",
        "config": {},
    })

agent_json.write_text(json.dumps(data, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

# Configure Qwen Code settings separately so API key/model are not stored in agent.json.
settings_path = Path.home() / ".qwen" / "settings.json"
if model_id or api_key_env or api_base_url:
    if settings_path.exists():
        settings = json.loads(settings_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    else:
        settings = {}

    providers = settings.setdefault("modelProviders", {}).setdefault("openai", [])
    provider = {
        "id": model_id or "openai-compatible",
        "name": model_id or "OpenAI Compatible",
    }
    if api_key_env:
        provider["envKey"] = api_key_env
    if api_base_url:
        provider["baseUrl"] = api_base_url

    replaced = False
    for i, item in enumerate(providers):
        if item.get("id") == provider["id"]:
            providers[i] = provider
            replaced = True
            break
    if not replaced:
        providers.append(provider)

    if api_key_env and api_key:
        settings.setdefault("env", {})[api_key_env] = api_key
    if model_id:
        settings["security"] = settings.get("security", {})
        settings["security"]["auth"] = settings["security"].get("auth", {})
        settings["security"]["auth"]["selectedType"] = "openai"
        settings["model"] = {"name": model_id}

    settings_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    settings_path.write_text(json.dumps(settings, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
    os.chmod(settings_path, 0o600)
    print(f"Configured Qwen Code settings: {settings_path}")
else:
    print("No Qwen Code model/API settings were written.")

print(f"Configured ACP runner '{runner_name}' in {agent_json}")
print("Refresh QwenPaw or reopen the Workspace -> ACP page to use it.")
PY

version.label: npm 版本（留空或 latest 表示最新版）
